core_dirs.grindbot/: Autonomous AI coding agent: planning, execution, validation in isolated worktrees
core_dirs.pixel-agents/src/: VS Code extension for pixel-art agent visualization
core_dirs.pixel-agents/webview-ui/src/: React webview UI with isometric office renderer
core_dirs.pixel-agents/server/: Hook server for Claude Code session event delivery
core_dirs.e2b/: Docker/sandbox template for E2B (legacy, replaced by Firecracker)
core_dirs.pixel-agents/shared/assets/: Shared sprite/asset loading and PNG decoding utilities

patterns: Python agent orchestration: scanner → planner → executor → validator → reflector pipeline
Rich Console for all Python output, never bare print()
All git operations abstracted through worktree.py module
Dual-mode session detection: hooks (preferred) vs heuristic JSONL polling fallback
Firecracker microVM sandboxing replacing E2B for task isolation
VS Code webview with Vite+React frontend and isometric pixel-art rendering
skip_hints: pixel-agents/ is a separate VS Code extension project — skip if task targets grindbot only
termmux/ is a minimal Electron skeleton with no meaningful source yet
.grindbot/sessions/ contains ephemeral session logs — skip for structural analysis
